latex:
A store pays $\$120$ for a bicycle.

\textbf{a.} What is the selling price of the bicycle when the markup is $60\%$?

\textbf{b.} The store is now going out of business and is selling all of the bicycles at a $30\%$ discount. What is the sale price of the bicycle?

\textbf{c.} Will the store make money or lose money on the bicycle? How much?
